summary: Frontend testing of mock interview feature - identified critical routing and navigation issues preventing access to /jobs page and Kanban functionality

critical_bugs.issue: /jobs page consistently redirects to landing page (/) even with valid IndexedDB data
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot access Kanban board or test mock interview functionality
critical_bugs.details: Jobs component redirects to '/' when no resume data found, but IndexedDB seeding appears successful yet data not being read correctly by React component

critical_bugs.issue: Button click does not navigate to /builder page
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot access builder functionality through normal user flow

integration_issues.issue: Data seeded successfully but not persisting between page navigations or not being read by React components
Navigation between pages not working correctly - URLs not updating as expected

untested_features.reason: Cannot access /jobs page to test interview column functionality
Cannot trigger modal without access to jobs page
Cannot access jobs page to test drag-and-drop functionality
Cannot access /builder or /jobs pages where floating nav should appear

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly without errors
No critical JavaScript console errors detected
IndexedDB seeding functionality works (data can be stored)
Basic UI elements render properly on landing page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical routing issues: 1) Investigate why /jobs page redirects to / even with valid IndexedDB data - check data reading logic in Jobs component useEffect. 2) Fix 'Go to builder' button navigation functionality. 3) Verify wouter routing configuration and ensure proper navigation between pages. 4) Test IndexedDB data persistence and React component data reading timing issues.
